feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales Contract with multiple items and decrement equally
entry.content:
We must create a sales contract with the same material listed multiple times, and each material has a different pricing. This happens because, in the sales contract, the pricing must foresee all possible variations that will occur when the sales orders come in, and other pricing will be applied; here are some samples of possible combinations that would impact the pricing:

Item 10: Material A + Ship-to A + Plant A + Incoterm A = PR00 $1.00 (and several other conditions)

Item 20: Material A + Ship-to B + Plant A + Incoterm A = PR00 $2.00 (and several other conditions)

Item 30: Material A + Ship-to B + Plant B + Incoterm A = PR00 $3.00 (and several other conditions)

Item 40: Material A + Ship-to B + Plant C + Incoterm B = PR00 $4.00 (and several other conditions)

Note that the material is always the same, but the rest of the elements would vary and the pricing will be different, and we can just create a contract with those items.

The problem is when the sales order comes in as it will have the Material A and will falls in one of the contract variations, like item 30 for example, and when this order is shipped, all other items needs to be decremented as well just the like 30 would be. 

Is there any standard way to do it? Decrement all items of the sales contract even if only one of them are referenced to a sales order?

I looked for Assortment Module for the contract WK1, but in our system the WK1 asks to add a material, not an assortment module. 

Any suggestion is appreciated!

entry.title: How to input manual iitem price in apps Create Sales Order
entry.content:
Is there any way to input manual item price when creating sales order through Fiori Create Sales Order apps? With VA01 I can input manual item price, but with create sales order apps, there is no field to input item price.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Schedule line date changed
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone please answer on this?

We have created MTO sales order on 31.01.2024 that time production order was not confirmed so system shows  requested delivery date to 07.02.2024, but very same day night  production order was confirmed and released and on 01.02.2024 GR done, but as per schedule line 07.02.2024 the loading date, transport planning date, material availability date should be 06.02.2024 but when production confirmed Via IT BATCH all the schedule line loading,planning, material availability date changed to 01.02.2024? Can anyone explain why IT BATCH has changed the date when scheduled date is 07.02.2024 and planning date is 06.02.2024 in sales order?

REQUESTED DELIVERY DATE WHEN ORDER NOT CONFIRMED -07.02.2024

LOADING DATE - 06.02.2024

TRANSPORTAION PLANNING DATE - 06.02.2024

MATERIAL AVAILABILITY DATE - 06.02.2024

But via IT BATCH it has automatically changed to 01.02.2024.

entry.title: Internal Subcontracting with quantity payback
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are currently facing a unique scenario in our Make-To-Order industry and would greatly appreciate your assistance in addressing it.

The situation at hand involves the following steps:

  1. Receipt of Semi-Finished Material for a Customer:

    • How should we appropriately add this material to our inventory?
    • Under which specific case within the SAP system should it be categorized?

  2. Manufacturing Process and Production of Finished Goods:

    • Once we receive the semi-finished material, we will proceed with the manufacturing process to transform it into finished products.

  3. Special Consideration for Revenue Recognition:

    • Upon completion of the manufacturing process, we have a unique arrangement with our customers wherein instead of receiving monetary compensation, we retain a portion of the finished products.
    • Specifically, we retain 10% of the finished products, while delivering the remaining 90% to the customer.
    • It is imperative that we accurately reflect this arrangement within the SAP system to ensure proper tracking and accounting for the retained portion as part of the overall production process.

We kindly seek your expertise in configuring the SAP system to effectively manage and document these steps in accordance with our business requirements.

Your insights and guidance on how to best address these intricacies within the SAP environment would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your valuable assistance.

Best regards,
Mohammed Abbas

entry.title: PU ordered quantity exceeded by 2
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am getting an error "PU ordered quantity exceeded by 2" while GR even though the ordered qty is 2. There is no exceed in qty both order and GR qty is same,  what may be the problem here.

Pls suggest any resolution here.

entry.title: Reprint Sales Contract with updated data
entry.content: Can we re print sales contract output with the updated sales contract data? If there is a miss typed quantity in sales contract and the sales contract already saved, then I want to change the quantity and re print it.

entry.title: Intrastat Intracompany Returns
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I was looking in the Community for a solution today for Intracompany Returns.
Basically the scenario is the following - we return goods from one affiliate plant to another logistics plant located in two different countries within the same company code. We use a return stock transport order.
At the end of the process in the Intrastat report we can see the order in the dispatch section in one of the plants, but don't see the receipt in the receiving plant. (we use movement types 161 and 671 within the process). 
As of what I have read by far, the only recent note I found is 2446786. All the other ones are quite older. We use S4 Hana Version 1709.
However, according this note we should change our process and use regular STO types and not a return.
My question is if someone has found any option to add the STO to the receipt of the receiving plant, or there is no other way than to change the process as suggested in 2446786?

Thank you in advance,
Regards,
Boris

entry.title: VLPODQ
entry.content: VLPODQ，交货单已经过账发货，移动类型是687，但是在VLPODQ界面中做确认时，报错：

entry.title: header condition distribution base on minimum price condition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is one requirement from client. There is one header discount condition ZX02- (fix amount) which distributed on line item level on base of net value. It is working fine. 

Now there is requirement that if any item has minimum price (PMIN) condition in that case discount(ZX02) amount for those lines should not be greater than difference of ( price - minimum price ) . Example Price(pr00) 1300 , Minimum Discount(PMIN) 1250, So in this case ZX02 not be greater then 50. Problem is that how we can achieve this. Further how another item (where PMIN not exist) ZX02  amount adjust to meet total discount amount. 
@SAPSupport

entry.title: Rule to be implemented on blocking deliveries and issues of goods linked to a released order (OVA8 c
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a need, when unblocking orders blocked due to exceeding the credit limit (VKM4), we have noticed that deliveries and the issue of goods are sometimes blocked, we want to prevent the blocking of deliveries and issue of goods , if the amount and quantity of the goods on the delivery or issue of goods is less than that of the order (whatever the deviation as long as it is less than the order amount), and then the tolerance on the amount of the order released?.

 

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Condition contract settlement accrual reversal: total value on first line item
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I perform the condition contract settlement of a customer condition contract in WB2R_SC

We are using EHP with all activated business functions and customizing is consistent with documentation from note 2723516.

I have accruals that should be reversed with the settlement. We have multiple line items and I created accruals on line item (for all articles system created accruals with every invoice). Now performing the settlement, the system determines the correct value of accruals and reverses them. On header level it looks good. But on item level it does not: System puts the accrual reversal REA2 in total on the first line item. So i have a huge accrual reversal on the first line item and no accrual reversals on the other line items.

From finance perspective this is not an issue but it does in controlling CO-PA, because the full accrual reversal is on one line / item. Example with dummy data below:

How can we achieve that system puts accrual reversal on those articles / line items, where it build the accruals ? and not everything on the first item ?

 

Thanks and best regards

SAP S/4HANA for enterprise contract managementSettlement Management

entry.title: Create with Reference - Screen selections
entry.content:
Hi, 

when referencing from sales order to contract a pop up screen is showing up to provide contract no. etc. I would like to add here an additional field: "Purchase Order Number", so that selection of contracts can be done based on this information. Does anyone have an idea how this can be achieved? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Tax destination country and partner for customer tax classification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

The scenario is -- sales organization is Canadian, Plant is in USA. So to calculate accurate taxes, we update the tax departure country as CA in sales order billing document tab. The customer tax classification is taken from ship-to party master data for determination of CTXJ condition (the access Country/State/Customer Classif.1/Material Classification). 

I noticed that when the tax destination country is also updated as CA, the source for customer tax classification changes to sold-to partner, although it uses the same access for CTXJ determination. The ship-to partner is always from Canada so even prior to manually updating this field, the destination country is always canada. 

I am trying to find any SAP note or documentation that supports/explains this behavior. All the notes/sources I found on SAP sites are related to EU taxes with VAT registration number. That isn't applicable in my scenario. (Also, we are on public cloud, if that makes a difference)

Any help would be appreciated.  

Regards,

Deepti

entry.title: Staging date in the delivery from a STO
entry.content:
Hello. 

We currently still work with SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 0. Whenever we create a delivery from an STO, the staging date in the delivery is the current date (date of creation of the delivery). 
I've followed the needed set up of SAP note 1960707 - No scheduling happens during delivery creation from STO. 

We have a delivery date in the STO of 10.09.2024

We have a planned delivery time and GR time on the material. 

In the STO, we do have a material staging date in the STO (this is the same date as the delivery date, which is not as expected, but not too bad for our business). 

When creating the delivery with VL10D, the material staging date is always the date of the delivery creation, which is not what you want. 

I hope someone can help what is missing.
Note that we do not work with routing. 

Gr, 

Charlotte

entry.title: System allows to deliver more than the planned scheduling agreement quantity
entry.content:
We have an issue with scheduling agreement. When we check in the Planning delivery schedule, we were able to deliver more than was planned scheduling agreement which is not correct from our point of view.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom fields are not appearing in Sales reports
entry.content:
We have created few Custom field. We want to fetch the reports based on these custom fields however we do not see these fields in the report query in analytics; e.g. Sales Volume - Flexible Analysis, Order to Cash Dashboard.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing records with Zero value displayed in sales order incompleteness log
entry.content:
We have pricing records maintained for Zero value. At the condition type level we also had a value for Zero Value Proc to "A"- Amount of Zero will be considered. However, these products in sales order show as incomplete.

We tried to copy the Sales order item Incompletion Procedure to a custom one and removed the Net Value field (NETWR) from the custom procedure. However this will still mark order as complete for the expired pricing records for the products that should have a price other than Zero.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Alphanumerical number range for a sales order is not possible
entry.content:
We need to use an alphanumerical number range for our sales orders but the external flag in the following SSCUI is not editable:

 > 102819 Define Number Ranges For Sales Documents


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I add Internal Price at item level to outbound ORDERS05 (Sales Order) IDoc?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to send internal price at item level to outbound ORDERS05 (Sales Order) IDoc.

I see that Internal price is marked for Statistics.

How could I achieve this?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Minimum order value VA01
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have maintained minimum order value for sales order AMIW/AMIZ. However, the condition value does not get updated at item level in order create VA01.

It is only when click on the header level conditions tab in the order that I can get the item level condition value to update for AMIW/AMIZ.  Can you explain why is this? and is there a way to get the condition value to update like YH01 in create mode?
